final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing educational infographic card for children explaining the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) from the Three Kingdoms era.

Style/medium: flat vector illustration, children's educational card style, playful cartoon storytelling aesthetic
Composition: single large knowledge card layout, title at top, main story illustration occupying center, key bullet points listed neatly on the side
Subject: the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战), featuring cartoon-style ancient Chinese warships, fire arrows, warriors in simplified armor, and strategic elements
Scene/backdrop: Yangtze River battle scene with warships, flames, and dramatic sky, presented in child-friendly simplified cartoon form
Text (verbatim): "赤壁之战"
Constraints: must be readable for children aged 6-12; key points must be clearly separated with punctuation; single-card format without multiple pages
Avoid: violent gore, overly complex historical details, realistic blood, scary faces, cluttered layout, adult-oriented war aesthetics
